    1. insertionPoint()

Interface DrumPad

All Superinterfaces:
Channel, DeleteableObject, DeviceChain, DuplicableObject, ObjectProxy, Subscribable
public interface DrumPad extends Channel
Instances of this interface are special kind of channel objects that represent the pads of a drum machine instrument. Drum pads are typically associated to channel objects via note keys.
Since:
API version 1

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    InsertionPoint
    insertionPoint()
    InsertionPoint that can be used to insert content in this drum pad.
